FROM customers c
| WHERE c.level = 'gold'
| SELECT c.customer_name, c.city
| ORDER c.customer_name ASC

FROM customers c
| WHERE c.city = 'Beijing'
| SELECT c.customer_name, c.level

FROM products p
| WHERE p.price > 1000
| SELECT p.product_name, p.category, p.price

FROM orders o
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| WHERE o.order_date > '2025-03-31'
| SELECT o.order_id, o.order_date
| ORDER o.order_date ASC

FROM order_items oi
| WHERE oi.unit_price < 200
| SELECT oi.item_id, oi.product_id, oi.quantity

FROM products p
| SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, p.price
| ORDER p.price DESC

FROM customers c
| WHERE c.city = 'Shanghai'
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
| GROUP c.customer_name
| AGG c.customer_name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
| ORDER total_sales DESC

FROM products p
| JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
| JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| WHERE o.order_date BETWEEN '2025-01-01' AND '2025-12-31'
| GROUP p.product_name
| AGG p.product_name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity
| ORDER total_quantity DESC
| LIMIT 3

FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP c.city
| AGG c.city, COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count
| HAVING COUNT(o.order_id) > 1
| ORDER order_count DESC

FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
| JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
| WHERE c.level = 'gold'
| WHERE p.category = 'computer'
| GROUP c.customer_name
| AGG c.customer_name
| ORDER c.customer_name ASC

| JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP p.category

| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP c.customer_id, c.customer_name
| AGG c.customer_id, c.customer_name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS paid_order_count

| AGG p.category, AVG(p.price) AS avg_price

| AGG c.level, COUNT(c.customer_id) AS customer_count
